top_signals.title: Clean GitHub repo tricks AI coding agents into running malware
top_signals.summary: An agentic coding tool tasked with cloning and setting up a seemingly benign GitHub repository could execute a malicious payload that remains invisible to security scanners, AI agents, and human reviewers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Venezuela earthquake death toll climbs amid anger over slow response
top_signals.summary: Country’s US-backed interim leader Delcy Rodríguez accused of failing to provide help for the victims
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
